node.text: Calvin encourages Dave in his car mod workshop endeavors and appreciates his enthusiasm and hard work.

node.text: Calvin finds working on cars to be a calming and head-clearing activity.

node.text: Calvin appreciates Dave's hard work and dedication in achieving his dream of opening a car maintenance shop.

node.text: Calvin owns a Ferrari and is attached to it, finding servicing it stressful but rewarding.

node.text: Calvin feels proud of his car and sees it as a symbol of his hard work and dedication.

node.text: Calvin enjoys long drives in a car to relax and clear his head.
Calvin acknowledges Dave's guts and ambition and supports him in pursuing his dreams.
